rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' primarily assigns responsibility for sentence- and paragraph-level writing improvements to enhance the draft's clarity and flow, making it load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: The delegation does not request assessment or addition of uncertainty disclosures in the draft, so it is out of scope.
rationale.RX.2: The delegation does not specify avoiding overclaims, rendering it out of scope for this projection.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is not explicitly part of the 'clean up' request, so it receives zero weight.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not indicated in the delegation, making it out of scope.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are not requested in the context of cleaning up the draft, so assigned zero weight.
